zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalen Clarke於1573年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Thomas Clark42歲，母親Margaret Fox30歲。她於1594年11月14日與Rolf Ralph Burnet在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 武爾諾斯 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 武爾其 霍結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1641年8月19日在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特享年68歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalen Clarke于1573年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas Clark42岁，母亲Margaret Fox30岁。她于1594年11月14日与Rolf Ralph Burnet在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 武爾諾斯 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 武爾其 霍结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1641年8月19日在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特享年68岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Magdelene
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalen Clarke was born in 1573, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Thomas Clark, was 42 and her mother, Margaret Fox, was 30. She married Rolf Ralph Burnet on 14 November 1594, in London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 19 August 1641, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalen Clarke est née en 1573, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Clark, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fox, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Rolf Ralph Burnet le 14 novembre 1594, à London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1641, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalen Clarke 1573 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Clark 42 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fox 30. Sie hat am 14. November 1594 in London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, England Rolf Ralph Burnet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. ja.lifeSummary: Magdalen Clarkeが1573年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Clarkは42歳，母Margaret Foxは30歳であった。1594年11月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト マリー ウルノス ウィス スト マリー ウルチャーチ ハウでRolf Ralph Burnetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1641年8月19日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターで68歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Benet Fink, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크
ko.London Saint Mary Woolnoth, London, Engl: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 보노스 위스 스트 메리 보c후르치 호
ko.lifeSummary: Magdalen Clarke(이)가 1573년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Clark(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fox(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1594년 11월 14일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 보노스 위스 스트 메리 보c후르치 호에서 Rolf Ralph Burnet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1641년 8월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalen Clarke nasceu em 1573, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Clark, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fox, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Rolf Ralph Burnet em 14 de novembro de 1594, em London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1641, em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London Saint Mary Woolnoth, London, Engl: лондон ст мэри вулнот вит ст мэри вулчурч хав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalen Clarke родилась в 1573 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Clark было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fox, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rolf Ralph Burnet 14 ноября 1594 г. в местности лондон ст мэри вулнот вит ст мэри вулчурч хав, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 19 августа 1641 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.London Saint Mary Woolnoth, London, Engl: London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magdalen Clarke nació en 1573, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Clark, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Fox, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Rolf Ralph Burnet el 14 de noviembre de 1594, en London St Mary Woolnoth with St Mary Woolchurch Haw, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1641, en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
